title: Code coverage at 63.6% despite all tests passing
evidence: test_coverage=0.636 from retort.db; defect_rate=1.0 confirms build+all tests pass. 6 test functions in handlers_test.go cover happy paths and key error cases, but some code paths (e.g. internal server error branches, malformed id parsing edge cases) are not exercised.
suggestion: Add tests for edge cases like invalid JSON on PUT, database errors, and boundary id values to improve coverage.
